subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who turned his face toward My countenance in the earliest days, who soared in Mine atmosphere and held fast unto that which was revealed from My presence, that he might be drawn thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم اذکر من اقبل الی وجهی فی اول الایام و طار فی هوائی و تمسک بما ظهر من عندی لیجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer
